description: Fetches the Look Ahead report which provides future assignments and availability details for People within a specified Group. To span all Groups in the company, use `"all"` in place of `{group_id}`.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: jobTitleIds
parameters.description: An array of UUIDs representing the Job Titles to include in the report. People with Job Titles not in this list will be excluded.

parameters.name: assignmentCount
parameters.description: The number of future assignments to return per person.

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: Whether to include the project name for each assignment.

parameters.name: project_number
parameters.description: Filters items by their exact project number. The query performs an exact match. Example usage: `/v2/companies/{company_id}/...?project_number=BR-2024`

parameters.name: assignmentStart
parameters.description: Whether to include the assignment start date.

parameters.name: assignmentEnd
parameters.description: Whether to include the assignment end date.

parameters.name: availableAfterDate
parameters.description: Whether to include the last day a person is assigned in the future.

parameters.name: employee_number
parameters.description: Filter results by the exact employee number of the Person.

parameters.name: jobTitle
parameters.description: Whether to include the person's Job Title.

parameters.name: assignmentDuration
parameters.description: Whether to include a calculated duration for each assignment.

schema.description: Returns an array of Look Ahead report objects.

items.description: Represents a single Person's Look Ahead report data, including assignments and availability.

available_after.description: The last day in the future that this person is assigned.

employee_number.description: The employee number of the person.

name.description: The first and last name of the person.

job_title_id.description: The UUID of the Job Title assigned to this person.

job_title_name.description: The name of the Job Title assigned to this person.

assignments.description: List of upcoming assignments for this person.
